Motion To Compel Responses To Request For Production Of Documents, Set 1 & For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-15-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Spencer Martinez, appeared for Plaintiff/moving party
Berly Weiner, appeared for Defendant/opposing party via telephone

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Responses To Requests For Production of Documents, Set One, is granted in part and moot in part. The court will not determine the adequacy of the production that has been made up to this time. Defendant is ordered to complete production no later than November 22, 2005. The court finds that the late production was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Defendants in the amount of $1,036.30, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. The court has read the late filed opposition. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
